items.subject: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.body: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

items.subject: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.body: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

items.subject: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.body: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.subject: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.body: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

summary:
Here are 5 key developments with insight:

• **OpenAI introduces new features for ChatGPT Enterprise**: OpenAI has released new usage analytics and updated spend controls for ChatGPT Enterprise, enabling organizations to better manage costs and scale AI adoption with confidence.

• **Improved health intelligence in ChatGPT**: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant has been improved to enhance health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

• **Advancements in AI in the marketing and advertising industry**: NVIDIA and its partners are using AI to revolutionize the advertising and marketing industry, providing new tools and technologies to enhance advertising and marketing capabilities.

• **Breakthrough in AI chemist research**: OpenAI and Molecule.one have shown that a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 can improve a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry research.

• **New method for predicting AI model behavior**: OpenAI has introduced Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

Trend: **Increased emphasis on responsible AI development and deployment**: The recent developments highlight a growing focus on ensuring the safe and responsible development and deployment of AI models, including new features for managing costs, improving model behavior, and enhancing health intelligence.
